prompt: How many carbon-12 atoms are in exactly 1 kilogram of carbon-12? (Avogadro's number is 6.02214076e23 per mole; one mole of carbon-12 is 12 grams.) Do not compute it exactly; give a calibrated estimate as three labeled values on one line, exactly: P5: <number>; P50: <number>; P95: <number> in scientific notation (P5/P95 bound your 90% interval, P50 median).
